descriptions.text:
12 Atari Game Compilation:
Asteroids, Asteroids Deluxe, Battlezone, Centipede, Crystal Castles, Gravitar, Millipede, Missile Command, Pong, Super Breakout, Tempest and Warlords
Atari Anniversary Edition is a 2001 video game compilation of Atari arcade games, developed by Digital Eclipse and published by Infogrames Interactive.
